hero.description: With Callception, AI automatically answers incoming calls, books appointments, logs complaints, and boosts customer satisfaction. 24/7 uninterrupted service, zero wait time.

features.title: Features That Empower Your Business
features.subtitle: Callception offers a comprehensive platform that digitizes your customer service from end to end.
features.aiAssistantDesc: Automatically answers incoming calls with Turkish natural language processing. Understands customer intent and takes appropriate action.
features.appointmentDesc: The AI assistant listens to customer requests and schedules appointments at suitable times. Reminder emails are sent automatically.
features.complaintDesc: Categorizes, prioritizes, and routes customer complaints to the relevant department.
features.reportingDesc: Call statistics, customer satisfaction, and performance metrics all in one dashboard.
features.crmDesc: Customer information, call history, and interaction records in an integrated CRM system.
features.securityDesc: Your data is protected in Turkey-based servers with GDPR-compliant infrastructure. End-to-end encryption.

howItWorks.title: Get Started in 3 Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Setup takes less than 10 minutes. No technical knowledge required.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Enter your company details, define the AI assistant personality and greeting message. Completed in 5 minutes.
howItWorks.step2Desc: A dedicated phone number is assigned to you or forward your existing number. Integration is automatic.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Your AI assistant starts answering incoming calls. Monitor live from the dashboard and review reports.

pricing.title: Choose the Right Plan for Your Business
pricing.subtitle: 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.testimonial1Text: Thanks to Callception, our missed call rate dropped from 30% to 3%. The AI assistant knows our customers as well as we do.
testimonials.testimonial2Text: Appointment management became fully automated. Our staff can now focus on more valuable tasks.
testimonials.testimonial3Text: Customer satisfaction increased by 40%. Being able to provide 24/7 uninterrupted service was a game changer.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Callception assigns a dedicated phone number to your business. Incoming calls are answered by AI, customer intent is understood, and appropriate actions (appointments, complaint logging, information) are performed automatically.
faq.a2: A typical setup takes less than 10 minutes. After entering your company information and AI assistant preferences, you can start receiving calls immediately.
faq.q3: How well does it understand Turkish?
faq.a3: Callception uses Google and Deepgram's advanced Turkish natural language processing engines. It successfully understands dialect differences, slang, and industry-specific terms.
faq.q4: Can it integrate with my existing CRM?
faq.a4: Yes! In addition to offering a built-in CRM, Callception can also work with platforms like Salesforce, HubSpot, and Zendesk through n8n automation integration.
faq.a5: Yes. All data is stored on servers in Turkey with GDPR-compliant infrastructure. End-to-end encryption, role-based access control, and regular security audits are applied.
faq.q6: How does the trial period work?
faq.a6: You can use your chosen plan completely free for 14 days. No credit card information required. You can cancel before the trial period expires.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Customer Service?
cta.subtitle: Try free for 14 days. Setup takes less than 10 minutes. No credit card required, cancel anytime.

leadForm.success: Thank you! We will contact you as soon as possible.
leadForm.error: An error occurred, please try again.

footer.description: AI-powered customer service and CRM platform. Turkey's most advanced AI receptionist.
